name: Chupe De Camarones (Shrimp Chowder)
recipeInstructions:
1. About 45 minutes before serving, heat salad oil in a Dutch oven.
2. Saute garlic and onion until golden (about 10 minutes).
3. Add tomatoes, potatoes, chili pepper, seasoned salt, 1-1/2 teaspoons salt, crushed red pepper, Tabasco, and water to the pot. Stir occasionally and bring to a boil.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes, covered.
5. Meanwhile, in a skillet with 1-1/2 cups water and 1/2 teaspoon salt, simmer flounder fillets for 6 minutes or until fork-tender but still moist.
6. Beat cream cheese with 1/4 cup milk until very smooth.
7. Stir the cream-cheese mixture into the soup, then add shrimp and corn. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes.
8. Drain the flounder fillets, divide each in half crosswise, and place a piece in each of 6 soup plates.
9. Spoon hot soup over the fillets and garnish with mint sprigs. Serve immediately.
